title: hv.pow~
description: alternative implementation to the pow~ object

messages.description: set numeric power to raise to

body: This abstraction presents an alternative implementation to the pow~ object. Heavy uses the system's powf() function (as does Pd), but some applications may wish to avoid the powf() function entirely. Both inlets are signal-rate. This abstraction may also make use of the hv.exp object instead of the exp~ object.
